zh.lifeSummary: 當Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyas於1085年出生在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾素德勒時，他的父親Harold de Sudeley29歲，母親Maud d'Chester14歲。他於大約1115年與Sybil在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於大約1147年在英國賀福爾艾亞斯 哈羅德享年63歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾比 多雷。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyas was born in 1085, in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Harold de Sudeley, was 29 and his mother, Maud d'Chester, was 14. He married Sybil about 1115, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died about 1147, in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, at the age of 63, and was buried in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyas est né en 1085, à Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Harold de Sudeley, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Maud d'Chester, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Sybil environ 1115, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé environ 1147, à Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 63 ans, et a été enterré à Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England: Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyas 1085 in Sudeley, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Harold de Sudeley 29 und seine Mutter Maud d'Chester 14. Er hat um 1115 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Sybil geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb um 1147 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England und wurde in Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyas è nato il nel 1085 nel Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Harold de Sudeley, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Maud d'Chester, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Sybil circa 1115, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì circa 1147, nel Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, all'età di 63 anni, e fu sepolto a Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyasが1085年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアスデリーで生まれた時，父Harold de Sudeleyは29歳，母Maud d'Chesterは14歳であった。約1115年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでSybilと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は約1147年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス ハロルドで63歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアアビー ドーアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyas(이)가 1085년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 수데리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Harold de Sudeley(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Maud d'Chester(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1115년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Sybil(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 대략 1147년 영국 허퍼드실르 와이아스 하로드에서 63세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 애브브이 도어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyas nasceu em 1085, em Sudeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Harold de Sudeley, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Maud d'Chester, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Sybil aproximadamente 1115, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1147, em Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, com 63 anos, e foi sepultado em Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, England: Abbey Dore, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baron Robert FitzHarold d' Ewyas родился в 1085 г. в местности судели, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Harold de Sudeley было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Maud d'Chester, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Sybil около 1115 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер около 1147 г. в местности ювяс харолд, хирефордшир, Англия в возрасте 63 лет и был похоронен в местности эбби дор, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
